mapper.sql: plal.id, plal.oa_order, plal.leave_type, plal.start_time, plal.end_time, plal.number, plal.version, plal.work_number, plal.hr_nick_name, plal.hr_time, plal.enabled_flag, plal.attribute1, plal.attribute2, plal.attribute3, plal.attribute4, plal.attribute5, plal.create_by, plal.create_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.leave_type as ${tAlias}_leave_type, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.number as ${tAlias}_number, ${tAlias}.version as ${tAlias}_version, ${tAlias}.work_number as ${tAlias}_work_number, ${tAlias}.hr_nick_name as ${tAlias}_hr_nick_name, ${tAlias}.hr_time as ${tAlias}_hr_time, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into ac_leave_application_line (id, oa_order, leave_type, start_time, end_time, number, version, work_number, hr_nick_name, hr_time, enabled_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_by, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{number,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{workNumber,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{hrNickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hrTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update ac_leave_application_line set id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leave_type = #{leaveType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, number = #{number,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, work_number = #{workNumber,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, hr_nick_name = #{hrNickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hr_time = #{hrTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
